title: Fermented Rice Paper Spring Roll
description: This fermented rice paper spring roll is a comforting diabetic-friendly dish featuring chewy rice paper sheets and fresh vegetables.
instructions: Prepare rice paper sheets by soaking them in water until soft. Rinse and set aside.
Slice the spring onions, cucumber, and pork chops into thin strips if using.
Mix fermented rice vinegar, lime juice, soy sauce, and garlic powder to create a dressing.
Lay out each rice paper sheet on a clean surface. Place a strip of vegetables or meat in one corner.
Fold both sides of the rice paper inward towards the center. Fold down the bottom edge over the filling, then roll up tightly from the top.
Serve immediately with more soy sauce and lime wedges for dipping.
